task_description: Execute two development cycles for Virtual-GENESIS: Cycle 1 (Evaluation Pressure / Perturbation Cycle - Option C) adds 5 new perturbation operators, v6 task set, performance analysis, and anti-shortcut benchmark. Cycle 2 (Minimal Anomaly Leverage - Option A) adds anomaly severity scoring, anomaly-aware verification, and anomaly-aware economy routing. All new mechanisms document their Legitimate Theft sources.
